programs.programName: Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) - Delaware PACE
Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB), Specified Low-Income Medicare Beneficiary (SLMB)

verified.notes: QMB program has no age requirement. Phone number for Delaware application not found in provided search results; contact Delaware Department of Health and Social Services or Delaware Department of Insurance for application assistance. Income and asset limits are current as of 2026 per official Delaware state insurance department source.

programs.notes: QMB program has no age requirement. Phone number for Delaware application not found in provided search results; contact Delaware Department of Health and Social Services or Delaware Department of Insurance for application assistance. Income and asset limits are current as of 2026 per official Delaware state insurance department source.

verified.notes: SNAP has no minimum age for seniors (55+); income limits are gross monthly at 200% FPL for households with member 60+ per Oct 2025-Sept 2026 data from snapscreener citing official rules; official DHSS site shows prior limits; no asset test for most households; phone from DHSS SNAP line.

programs.notes: SNAP has no minimum age for seniors (55+); income limits are gross monthly at 200% FPL for households with member 60+ per Oct 2025-Sept 2026 data from snapscreener citing official rules; official DHSS site shows prior limits; no asset test for most households; phone from DHSS SNAP line.

verified.notes: Income from non-.gov source citing current limits; official DE DHSS site lacks specific figures. No phone or assets found. Program active as DEAP in 2026.
